data.title: Tether Dominance Surges as USDC Retreats from Exchanges
data.description:
The growing divergence in their behavior is reshaping the stablecoin landscape and raising concerns about liquidity concentration.
source: https://coindoo.com/tether-dominance-surges-as-usdc-retreats-from-exchanges/

data.title: Thailand SEC Opens Consultation on Exchange-Issued Tokens, July 21 Feedback Deadline
data.description:
Thailand has proposed updated listing standards that permit exchanges to list their own or affiliated tokens when used on-chain, provided issuers and related parties are fully disclosed. Exchanges would update legacy token data within 90 days, supporting market integrity and investor safeguards.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/thailand-sec-consultation-exchange-issued-tokens/

data.title: Texas Sheriffs Crack Bitcoin ATM With Power Tools to Retrieve $32,000
data.description:
Jasper County Sheriff Chuck Havard told Decrypt that authorities have likely accessed the machines before.
source: https://decrypt.co/326308/texas-sheriffs-crack-bitcoin-atm-with-power-tools-to-retrieve-32000

data.title: BOE Governor’s Skepticism Threatens Digital Pound Timeline Amid Global CBDC Race
data.description:
Speaking in Kyiv, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has questioned the need for a retail Digital Pound, citing unclear benefits, while confirming that wholesale CBDC work for financial institutions has advanced and pondering whether strict bank regulation has increased risk in non-bank sectors.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/digital-pound-timeline-risk-boe-governor-doubts-need/

data.title: SOL Set for $200 Breakout as ETF Odds Hit 91% and ‘Solana Summer’ Begins
data.description:
SOL has traded near $142 in a make-or-break range as corporate treasuries have pivoted to Solana, seven asset managers have filed spot ETF bids with 91% approval odds, and tomorrow’s “Solana Summer” launch has sharpened focus on a climb toward $200.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sol-at-make-or-break-level-3-reasons-200-could-come-fast/

data.title: Norway Plans 2025 Ban on Power-Hungry Crypto Mining Centers – Industry on Edge
data.description:
Norway has indicated a policy shift by proposing a temporary ban, effective autumn 2025, on constructing new power-intensive cryptocurrency mining data centres. Officials say the step preserves renewable electricity for job-creating industries and supports national climate goals.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/norway-2025-crypto-mining-ban/

data.title: Reddit in Talks with Worldcoin to Indentify Users – Sparks Privacy Concerns
data.description:
TL;DR Reddit is in talks with Tools for Humanity to integrate World ID, an iris-scanning technology that verifies users without revealing their identity. The possible adoption aims to curb bots, fake content, and comply with new age verification laws, without forcing users to adopt the tool. The rumor pushed Worldcoin (WLD) up 5%, though it. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/reddit-in-talks-with-worldcoin-to-indentify-users-sparks-privacy-concerns/

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/359048/wyoming-stable-token-commission-targets-aug-20-for-wyst-stablecoin-mainnet-launch?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Texas Man Loses $32,000 Life Savings in Bank Impersonation Scheme – But Chase Will Only Reimburse Him $2,000: Report
data.description:
A school teacher in Texas reportedly lost all of his life savings after answering a phone call from someone who pretended to be working for his bank. WFAA reports that the schemers called Russell Leahy and convinced him that they were bankers with Chase Bank.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/20/texas-man-loses-32000-life-savings-in-bank-impersonation-scheme-but-chase-will-only-reimburse-him-2000-report/

The stock has gained over 600% since its IPO in June and now. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/circle-gets-first-buy-rating-amid-stablecoin-boom-600-surge-and-just-getting-started/

data.title: Russia’s tax authority calls for legalizing crypto exchange
data.description:
Russia needs to legalize the domestic exchange of cryptocurrencies, the head of the sanctioned country’s tax authority has suggested. Russia’s recently regulated crypto mining industry is currently selling most of the coins it mints abroad and this is impeding its development, the tax executive noted. His call to allow crypto sales comes amid ongoing discussions […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-authority-calls-for-crypto-exchange/
